name: Intelligence Creatures
description:
Creature support modules for New Intelligence, designed for use with Horn of the Abyss on VCMI.

These optional modules add Intelligence-based combat mana support to selected magical, mystical, or knowledge-themed creature lines. Exact thresholds, scaling values, and creature-specific details are listed in each individual module description.

## Included Creature Support

* **Mages** — **Arch Mages** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Mages**.
* **Priests** — **Zealots** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Monks**.
* **Sea Witches** — **Sorceresses** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Sea Witches**.
* **Liches** — **Power Liches** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Liches**.
* **Shamans** — **Great Shamans** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Shamans**.
* **Unicorns** — **War Unicorns** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Unicorns**.
* **Psychic and Magic Elementals** — **Magic Elementals** start contributing at a smaller required stack size and provide much stronger **total combat mana** support than base **Psychic Elementals**.
* **Couatls** — both **Couatls** and **Crimson Couatls** start providing support from a stack of 1 creature. **Crimson Couatls** provide stronger support than base **Couatls** and gain uncapped late **total combat mana** scaling from very large stacks.
* **Ogre Mage** — expands the spellcasting identity of **Ogre Mages** by giving them an additional magical support role through Intelligence-based **total combat mana**.
* **Pit Lord** — expands the dark spellcasting identity of **Pit Lords** with Intelligence-based **total combat mana** support, giving them an additional magical role.
* **Medusa Queen** — expands the mystical identity of **Medusa Queens** with Intelligence-based **total combat mana** support, giving them an additional magical role.
* **Greater Basilisk** — expands the petrifying mystical nature of **Greater Basilisks** with Intelligence-based **total combat mana** support, giving them an additional magical role.
* **Yeti Runemaster** — gives **Yeti Runemasters** Intelligence-based **total combat mana** support, expanding their runic mystical role.
* **Enchanter** — gives **Enchanters** Intelligence-based **total combat mana** support, reinforcing their neutral spellcaster role.
* **Faerie Dragon** — gives **Faerie Dragons** magical support based on Intelligence, with uncapped **total combat mana** scaling.
author: bew_
